description_long: This object represents a young child with stylized proportions, featuring a large head, small body, and exaggerated limbs. The child has long, straight hair styled into two thick pigtails, each adorned with small spherical accessories. The clothing appears to be a simple, short-sleeved top and a skirt or dress, with visible folds and a layered look. The limbs are slender and elongated, with the arms and legs extending outward in a dynamic pose. The face is partially visible, showing a large eye and a small nose, with a generally smooth and cartoon-like appearance. The overall form is simplified, with minimal surface detail and a focus on broad shapes and color blocks.
description: A stylized child with long pigtails, wearing a short-sleeved top and skirt, posed dynamically with elongated limbs and cartoon-like features.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the child's head, pigtails, and the spread of limbs, with hair accessories and the top of the head clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the pigtails, the outstretched arms and legs, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, pigtails, and the back of the clothing, with limbs extending outward.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and back, with emphasis on the dynamic pose and the flow of the hair and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved top and skirt with layered design
attribute_hairstyle: long straight pigtails with hair accessories
attribute_posture: dynamic pose with limbs extended outward
